name: Review card full flow — confidence, reveal, grade
description: Complete a full review cycle: rate confidence, reveal answer, grade the card with one of the FSRS buttons, and see the next card or session complete screen.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Navigate to the Review Cards page from the sidebar
Click the Reveal Answer button that appears
Verify the answer text is now visible below the question, and four grade buttons labeled Again, Hard, Good, and Easy are displayed
Verify the card advances to the next card showing a new question, or a session complete message appears if all cards are reviewed
